name: Kindling Development
postCreateCommand: poetry env remove --all 2>/dev/null; poetry install --with dev --sync && poetry run python -c "import xdist" && git config --unset-all core.hooksPath; pre-commit install && bash -lc 'grep -q "# kindling .env auto-load" ~/.bashrc || { echo "# kindling .env auto-load" >> ~/.bashrc; echo "[ -f /workspaces/kindling/.env ] && set -a && source /workspaces/kindling/.env && set +a" >> ~/.bashrc; }; CITY=/workspaces/kindling/city/city.toml; if ! grep -q "^provider" $CITY; then if command -v claude &>/dev/null; then P=claude; elif command -v codex &>/dev/null; then P=codex; elif command -v gh &>/dev/null && gh extension list 2>/dev/null | grep -q copilot; then P=copilot; fi; [ -n "$P" ] && sed -i "s|# provider = \"$P\"|provider = \"$P\"|" $CITY && echo "✅ Gas City: provider set to $P" || echo "⚠️  Gas City: no provider detected — set provider in city/city.toml before running gc start"; fi; gc start /workspaces/kindling/city && gc rig add /workspaces/kindling --name kindling 2>/dev/null || true'
postStartCommand: bash -c '[ -f "/workspaces/kindling/.env" ] && echo "✅ .env will load in new terminals" || echo "⚠️  No .env file found"; gc start /workspaces/kindling/city 2>/dev/null || true'
